comment: GPU Health Test - Basic GPU health check with XPUM monitoring
GPU Diagnostic Test - Comprehensive diagnostic (long level) XPUM monitoring
PCIe Bandwidth Test - with XPUM monitoring, no CPU stress
Memory Stress Test - 300 second memory stress test, no CPU stress
Power Stress Test - 900 seconds power stress test with CPU stress
EDP Stress Test - 900 seconds edp stress test with CPU stress
Collect Logs - Generate HTML summary and zip all log files
